message.content:
Create the following 5 page components in C:\Users\User\stan-io\pages\. Each page must use CSS variables (var(--bg-base), var(--text-primary), var(--accent), etc.) and import from the project's existing UI components and demo data.

IMPORTANT CONTEXT:
- Project location: C:\Users\User\stan-io
- UI components available: Button (from ../components/ui/Button), Card (from ../components/ui/Card), Badge (from ../components/ui/Badge), StatsCard (from ../components/ui/StatsCard), DataTable (from ../components/ui/DataTable), Tabs (from ../components/ui/Tabs), EmptyState (from ../components/ui/EmptyState), Modal (from ../components/ui/Modal), Toggle (from ../components/ui/Toggle)
- Demo data from ../lib/demo-data: demoUser, demoProducts, demoBookingConfig, demoBookings, demoMembership, demoOrders, demoSubscribers, demoAffiliates
- Types from ../types: Booking, BookingConfig, Membership, Order, Subscriber, Affiliate
- Use Tailwind CSS with CSS custom properties
- Icons from lucide-react
- Every component is a default export

Create these files:

## 1. pages/Bookings.tsx
- Page title "Bookings"
- StatsCards row: Upcoming Bookings (count with status confirmed), Completed, Total Revenue from bookings
- Booking configuration panel (Card): duration (60 min), buffer times, calendar connection status (green badge if connected)
- Weekly availability grid showing demoBookingConfig.availability - days as rows, toggle for enabled, time inputs for start/end
- Upcoming bookings list: each booking as a Card with customer name, email, date, time, status badge, notes
- Status badges: confirmed = accent, completed = success, pending = warning, cancelled = error

## 2. pages/Memberships.tsx
- Page title "Memberships"
- Overview card: member count (128), monthly price ($39), MRR ($4,992), interval badge
- Benefits list from demoMembership.benefits with checkmark icons
- "Edit Benefits" button
- Members table (use some demoSubscribers as mock members): name, email, joined date, status
- Growth chart placeholder (simple bar showing members over time)
- "Invite Member" button, "Export Members" button (secondary)

## 3. pages/Orders.tsx
- Page title "Orders"
- StatsCards: Total Orders (count), Revenue (sum), Refund Rate (% refunded), Avg Order Value
- Filter tabs: All, Completed, Pending, Refunded
- Full orders table using DataTable with all demoOrders: Order ID, Customer, Product, Amount (formatted as $XX.XX), Status badge, Payment method icon, Date (formatted nicely)
- Search input for orders
- "Export CSV" button (secondary)
- Each row clickable with a simple detail view concept

## 4. pages/Subscribers.tsx
- Page title "Subscribers"
- StatsCards: Total Subscribers, New This Month, From Purchases, From Free Downloads
- Full subscriber table with demoSubscribers: Name, Email, Tags (as badges), Source, Subscribed Date
- Search + filter by tag dropdown
- "Export List" and "Import Subscribers" buttons
- Tag management: show unique tags from all subscribers as filter chips
- Bulk actions dropdown (Delete, Add Tag, Remove Tag)

## 5. pages/Affiliates.tsx
- Page title "Affiliates"  
- StatsCards: Total Affiliates, Active, Total Sales via Affiliates (sum), Total Payouts (sum of earnings)
- Affiliate table with demoAffiliates: Name, Email, Code, Commission %, Sales, Earnings, Status badge
- Status badges: active = success, pending = warning, disabled = error
- "Add Affiliate" button opens a conceptual form area
- Affiliate link generator section: shows the base URL with affiliate code appended
- Commission settings panel: default commission %, cookie duration

Create the pages/ directory if needed, then write each file.

content.text: I'll start by reading the project structure and existing files to understand the codebase patterns.

content.text:
All 5 files are created and verified. Here is a summary of what was built:

---

## Created Files

### 1. `C:\Users\User\stan-io\pages\Bookings.tsx` (11,573 bytes)
- Page title "Bookings" with description
- **StatsCards row**: Upcoming Bookings (counts confirmed), Completed (counts completed), Total Revenue (calculated from booking price * relevant bookings)
- **Booking configuration panel** (Card): session duration (60 min), buffer times (15 min before/after), calendar connection status (green Badge when connected)
- **Weekly availability grid**: all 7 days from `demoBookingConfig.availability`, each row has day name, Toggle for enabled, time inputs for start/end, formatted time preview
- **Upcoming bookings list**: each booking as a Card with customer name, email, date, time, status badge, notes; includes Reschedule/Cancel buttons for confirmed bookings
- Status badges: `confirmed` = accent, `completed` = success, `pending` = warning, `cancelled` = error
- Interactive state management for availability toggles and time changes

### 2. `C:\Users\User\stan-io\pages\Memberships.tsx` (8,707 bytes)
- Page title "Memberships" with description
- **Overview card**: member count (128), monthly price ($39), MRR ($4,992), interval badge ("monthly")
- **Benefits list** from `demoMembership.benefits` with green checkmark icons; inline editing mode with "Edit Benefits" button
- **Member growth chart**: simple bar chart showing 6 months of mock growth data (Sep-Feb), bars proportional to member count
- **Members table** using DataTable with `demoSubscribers` as mock members: Name, Email, Joined date, Status (active/churned)
- "Invite Member" and "Export Members" buttons in header

### 3. `C:\Users\User\stan-io\pages\Orders.tsx` (11,428 bytes)
- Page title "Orders" with description
- **StatsCards**: Total Orders (10), Revenue (sum of completed), Refund Rate (10.0%), Avg Order Value
- **Filter tabs** (using Tabs component): All, Completed, Pending, Refunded
- **Search input** for filtering by customer name, email, product title, or order ID
- **Full orders table** using DataTable with all `demoOrders`: Order ID (monospace accent), Customer (name + email), Product, Amount (formatted as $XX.XX via Intl.NumberFormat), Status badge, Payment method icon (CreditCard for Stripe, Wallet for PayPal), Date (formatted with month/day/year/time)
- **Expandable detail view**: clicking a row expands an order detail Card with full info and action buttons (Send Receipt, Issue Refund)
- "Export CSV" button (secondary)

### 4. `C:\Users\User\stan-io\pages\Subscribers.tsx` (11,461 bytes)
- Page title "Subscribers" with description
- **StatsCards**: Total Subscribers (5), New This Month, From Purchases (3), From Free Downloads (1)
- **Tag filter chips**: extracts all unique tags from subscribers, clickable filter chips that toggle active/inactive state
- **Search input** for filtering by name, email, or tag
- **Full subscriber table** with DataTable: checkbox column, Name, Email, Tags (as accent Badges), Source, Subscribed Date
- **Bulk actions dropdown**: appears when rows are selected, offers Add Tag, Remove Tag, Delete options
- Select all checkbox with selection count display
- "Export List" and "Import Subscribers" buttons

### 5. `C:\Users\User\stan-io\pages\Affiliates.tsx` (14,039 bytes)
- Page title "Affiliates" with description
- **StatsCards**: Total Affiliates (3), Active (2), Total Sales via Affiliates (55), Total Payouts ($1,714.15)
- **Affiliate table** with DataTable: Name+Email, Code (monospace), Commission %, Sales, Earnings (formatted currency), Status badge, Copy link action button
- Status badges: `active` = success, `pending` = warning, `disabled` = error
- **"Add Affiliate" button** toggles a form area with inputs for Name, Email, Affiliate Code, Commission Rate
- **Affiliate link generator section**: shows each affiliate with their full referral URL (`https://stan.store/sarahcreates?ref=CODE`), copy button with check animation feedback
- **Commission settings panel**: default commission % input, cookie duration (days) input, Save Settings button
- All copy-to-clipboard actions with visual feedback (checkmark for 2 seconds)

---

**Key patterns used across all files:**
- CSS custom properties: `var(--bg-base)`, `var(--text-primary)`, `var(--accent)`, `var(--border-default)`, etc.
- Imports from `../components/ui/*` (Button, Card, Badge, StatsCard, DataTable, Tabs, Toggle)
- Demo data from `../lib/demo-data`
- Types from `../types`
- Icons from `lucide-react`
- Every component is a `default export`
- Tailwind CSS classes combined with CSS variables
- `page-enter` animation class from globals.css
- All TypeScript compiles clean (zero errors in these 5 files)
